title: Shake Input Error

statement.markdown:
text: # Shake Input Error Challenge
### A fun animation challenge from codepen

constraints: Use a class selector for the CSS animation
Use the `requestAnimationFrame` function to animate the input element
Use the `querySelector` function to select the input element
Use the `addEventListener` function to listen for the `blur` and `input` events
Use the `getComputedStyle` function to get the computed style of the input element
Use the `scrollWidth` property to get the scroll width of the input element

starterCode.html: Username is required

gradingCriteria.description: The input element shakes when the input is invalid
The animation uses a smooth easing function
The input element has a valid placeholder text
The input element has a valid error message displayed when the input is invalid
The animation is smooth and doesn't look choppy
The solution meets all the constraints
The code is well-structured, readable and maintainable
The code is efficient and doesn't use unnecessary resources
